internal_issues.description: H3 c11: 4.8x single-anchor style inconsistent with range presentation elsewhere. Added range '(4.1-4.8x across 70-90S anchor choices; polar anchor shown here)' in both detail_evidence and detail_extra.
H5 c11: monitor.py claims unverifiable without source snapshot. Softened to 'Domain 4 of the live-power page' in detail_evidence (2 occurrences) and detail_extra (1 occurrence).
H6 c11: V51.0/V51.2 version label mix. Added parenthetical '(ECM model header; live-power audit statistics current V51.2)' at first V51.0 occurrence.
H4 c11: lambda_g line citation 'line 70' should be 'lines 22, 70' — L70 contains the formula, L22 defines the value. Fixed in detail_evidence.
H2 c11: Refraction cascade closing sentence orphan still present. EXP-246 pending analyst delivery. No action this run.

H1 c11: Pappa SAA overcite. Already fixed by EXP-245 integration in previous run (2026-04-24T19:26Z, commit 43fa5da). c11 review noted it as still open because review was written before integration. Confirmed fixed — ISS-1501 closed in prior run.
